p.strong: One logical operator → Multiple physical implementations

div.p: Decision Factors: • Input cardinality (estimated rows) • Selectivity (predicate match rate) • Available indexes • Sort order of inputs • Memory constraints
Filter Merging Filter is absorbed into scan: SeqScan(pred) or IndexScan(pred) Cost reduction: evaluate predicate during row fetch, not after.
When chosen: • selectivity > 15% • no suitable index • small table
When chosen: • selectivity < 15% • index on predicate col • sorted output needed
O(M+N) • equi-joins • unsorted inputs • memory fits
O(M×N) • small outer table • indexed inner • non-equi joins
O(M+N) sorted • pre-sorted inputs • need sorted output • disk-based
When chosen: • unsorted input • many groups • memory fits
When chosen: • sorted input • few groups • need sorted output
